Container.Name: AllDebrid-Client
Container.Overview:
[b]AllDebrid-Client[/b] — Self-hosted torrent automation via AllDebrid.
Add magnet links through the Web UI, a watch folder, Sonarr/Radarr, or the REST API. Torrents are uploaded to AllDebrid, polled until ready, unlocked, and downloaded via aria2.
[b]Features:[/b] • Full torrent lifecycle: upload → poll → unlock → aria2 → done → Discord • Watch folder — drop .torrent or .magnet files for auto-import • Slot-based aria2 queue with configurable concurrent download limit • Discord rich embeds for add / complete / error events • FlexGet v3 integration (schedule + manual trigger) • SQLite (default) or PostgreSQL (external) • Sonarr / Radarr import trigger • File filters — block by extension, keyword, minimum size • Automatic no-peer cleanup and stuck-download detection
[b]Quick Setup:[/b] 1. Set paths for Config, Data, Watch, Processed, and Downloads 2. Open http://[IP]:8080 → Settings → enter AllDebrid API key → Save 3. Configure aria2 RPC URL in Settings → Download 4. Add magnets via UI or drop files in the Watch folder
[b]Network:[/b] Uses host network mode to avoid conflicts with Unraid shares (shfs).
Container.Description: Self-hosted torrent automation via AllDebrid. Upload magnets via Web UI, watch folder, Sonarr/Radarr or API. aria2 downloads, Discord webhooks, FlexGet integration, file filters.

Config.Name: Config Folder
Config.Description: [REQUIRED] Stores config.json. Must be persistent across restarts.

Config.Name: Data Folder
Config.Description: [REQUIRED] Stores the SQLite database and automatic backups.

Config.Name: Watch Folder
Config.Description: Drop .torrent or .magnet files here for automatic import.

Config.Name: Processed Folder
Config.Description: Torrent/magnet files are moved here after processing.

Config.Name: Download Folder
Config.Description: [REQUIRED] Downloaded files land here (must match aria2 download path).

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Container timezone — used for all timestamps in logs and Discord messages. Examples: Europe/Berlin, UTC, America/New_York. Full list: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging verbosity. Use DEBUG for troubleshooting, INFO for normal operation.

Config.Name: Database Type
Config.Description: Leave empty to use SQLite (default). Set to 'postgres' to use an external PostgreSQL database (configure connection in the web UI Settings).

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: Internal config file path — do not change unless you know what you are doing.

Config.Name: DB Path
Config.Description: Internal SQLite database path — do not change unless you know what you are doing.
